# PERF-019 negative: range by index to avoid copying the struct
lang: go
file: PERF-019-safe.go
---
package sample

type Record struct {
	ID   int64
	Blob [256]byte
	Meta [1024]byte
}

func processRecords(records []Record) {
	for i := range records {
		_ = processRecord(records[i])
	}
}

func processRecord(r Record) int64 { return r.ID }
